name: MoneyGram
description_short: Arlington, TX MoneyGram at 2210 S Fielder Rd offers money transfer and check cashing services with extended hours seven days a week.
description_long:
Located at 2210 S Fielder Rd in Arlington, TX, this MoneyGram location operates as a standalone check-cashing store open seven days a week. The storefront serves the Arlington community with consistent 8 AM to 10 PM hours Monday through Sunday, making it accessible for residents needing services during evening hours. This standalone facility in Arlington focuses entirely on providing financial services without being housed inside another business.

The Arlington MoneyGram at 2210 S Fielder Rd specializes in check cashing, money transfers, and related financial services. Customers can reach this location at +1 817-277-3505 to confirm services, inquire about current rates, or verify processing times before visiting. Staff at this TX location can answer questions about what documents you'll need to bring and discuss the services available for your specific transaction.

If you're in Arlington and need to cash a check or send money locally, having a dedicated check-cashing location like this MoneyGram on South Fielder Road provides a reliable alternative to banks. Bring a valid government-issued ID and your checks or transfer details when you visit this Arlington, TX branch. MoneyGram operates this location to serve the financial needs of the Arlington area.
pros: 36+ locations in Arlington, Texas providing extensive geographic accessibility
Extended operating hours at most locations (many open until 9-11:59 PM)
Dual channel service model allowing online initiation with in-store pickup
Partnership with major retailers (Walmart, CVS) for convenient access
Specialized multiservice locations (Envios Y Mas) supporting international remittances
Services available both online and offline for maximum flexibility
Established global network for both domestic and international transfers
cons: Transaction fees apply to all transfers, reducing net amount received by recipient
No account-based services, credit products, or lending capabilities
Service limited to point-to-point money movement without financial management tools
Reliance on third-party retail partners means service availability depends on individual location hours
Website shows mixed location results across multiple states, potentially indicating navigation complexity for users
best_for: Customers needing to send money to family or friends without a bank account
International remittance senders using multiservice partner locations
Unbanked or underbanked consumers seeking cash-based transfer solutions
Customers who value extended evening and weekend service hours for money transfers
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers and international remittance senders who need accessible, extended-hours money transfer services without opening a financial account. The primary caveat is that all transactions incur fees and the service is limited to money movement only—it does not provide banking, credit, or financial management services.
services: Online money sending with in-store cash pickup
Cash access at retail partner locations
meta_description: MoneyGram at 2210 S Fielder Rd, Arlington, TX. Check cashing and money transfers with extended hours Mon-Sun 8AM-10PM.
